get.description:
Returns general node information including node online status and parameters like serial number,
manufacturer, nodeName, MAC, IP and Radio signal strength.

As because of TR-069 encryption considerations actual passphrase cannot be sent, returned
passphrase value is always "******".

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Node identity

parameters.name: exactId
parameters.description: Parameter indicating whether provided id is used as an exact node identifier even when there are nodes with the same serial number in the system.

parameters.name: deduplicationQuery
parameters.description:
Query used only when there is more than one node with the same serial number in the system. The query is used to select one node from a pool of duplicates.

 Condition has form: *fieldName operator value*

 - **nin** - Field value is different than all given values. Condition Value Type = [Field Type]

 - **notcontains** - Field value not contains the given value. Applicable only to collection fields. Condition Value Type = Field Item Type
 - **containsany** - Field value contains any of the given values. Applicable only to collection fields. Condition Value Type = Field Type
